summary: Iteration 58: Full backend + frontend testing of AI Chat feature. All 15 backend tests passed. All UI features verified: WhatsApp-style chat UI, action cards (amber Note Added, violet Status Changed), session sidebar, typing indicator, new chat flow.

design_issues.screen: AI Chat - Empty state after New Chat
issues: After clicking 'New Chat' button, suggestion chips don't appear because activeSessionId is set immediately in newSession(). The empty state condition is `!activeSessionId && messages.length === 0`, but newSession() sets a new ID so condition becomes false. Suggestion chips only appear on first page load before any session interaction.

action_items: Minor UX: Consider showing suggestion chips for empty new sessions (change condition from `!activeSessionId && messages.length === 0` to just `messages.length === 0`) so users see guidance after clicking New Chat
critical_code_review_comments: Add note action: note field is overwritten ($set) instead of appended, meaning each new note replaces the previous one. Consider using $push to notes array.
ai_chat.py line 213: `from server import send_crm_email_for_school` is an in-function import inside a loop; could cause circular import issues under high load.
Sessions list retrieves up to 30 sessions but the sidebar has no pagination/load-more; if user has >30 sessions, older ones are silently dropped.
seed_data_creation: Test note added to Sudarshan Daga School ('pytest integration test note'). Status changed to follow_up. These are in existing test sessions.

ai_chat_tab_navigation.details: AI Chat visible in admin sidebar at /admin/ai-chat, nav item has 'active' class when on that route

whatsapp_style_ui.details: Green header (#075E54) verified, WhatsApp leaf background pattern, green user message bubble (#dcf8c6), white AI message bubble with shadow, side-by-side layout with session sidebar

new_chat_button.details: data-testid='new-chat-btn' found, visible, clickable. Creates new session ID and clears messages.

message_send_flow.details: data-testid='ai-chat-input' fills correctly, data-testid='ai-chat-send-btn' enabled when input has text, Enter key also sends. Typing indicator (3 bounce dots) appears while waiting.

add_note_action_card.details: Amber card (bg-amber-50 border-amber-200) with 'Note Added — Sudarshan Daga School' and 'Note saved' detail. AI response: 'Added note to Sudarshan Daga School...'

change_status_action_card.details: Violet card (bg-violet-50 border-violet-200) with 'Status Changed — Sudarshan Daga School' and 'Status → follow_up' detail. AI correctly identified school ID and executed status change.

session_history_persistence.details: 7 sessions visible in sidebar. Clicking a session loads its message history. Session previews show AI response text and date.

empty_state_suggestion_chips.details: Suggestion chips visible on first load (before any session selected). Shows 6 chips: 'Show me all follow-up leads', 'Create a new lead for ABC School in Mumbai', 'Generate a proposal for a school', 'What are my active schools?', 'Change status of a school to converted', 'Send introduction email to a school'. NOT visible after clicking New Chat (minor UX issue).

session_list_updates.details: Session list in sidebar updates automatically after each conversation - session count went from 6 to 7 after new message was sent.

backend_endpoints.details: POST /api/ai-chat/message: 200 ✅ | GET /api/ai-chat/sessions: 200 ✅ | GET /api/ai-chat/history/{id}: 200 ✅ | DELETE /api/ai-chat/session/{id}: 200 ✅ | All require auth (401 without token) ✅

context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Chat feature at /admin/ai-chat is fully working. Backend 15/15 tests pass. All action cards verified (amber=Note Added, violet=Status Changed). Only minor UX note: suggestion chips don't show after clicking 'New Chat' because newSession() sets activeSessionId immediately. Sudarshan Daga School has been used for test data (school_id: f49acfa3-623d-4540-b039-56ba32ff7e7e).
rca_of_issue: Suggestion chips visibility: AdminAIChat.jsx line 382 condition `!activeSessionId && messages.length === 0` — the newSession() function on line 217 calls setActiveSessionId(newId) before any messages exist, so suggestion chips never render after New Chat click. Fix: change condition to `messages.length === 0` only.
